queries.question: Any update on vessel Maersk Horizon?
queries.expected_answer: MV Maersk Horizon was delayed because of severe weather near Rotterdam and unloading operations were suspended.
queries.actual_answer: The vessel MV Maersk Horizon, carrying shipment SHP0001, experienced a delay due to severe weather conditions in the North Sea.
